name: Danger! Response Team
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>未</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>域</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>調</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>査</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>報</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>告</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Danger!" monster you control and 1 monster on the field; return them to the hand. If this card is in the GY: You can discard 1 "Danger!" monster; place this card on the bottom of the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Danger! Response Team" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Danger!" monster you control and 1 monster on the field; return them to the hand. If this card is in the GY: You can discard 1 "Danger!" monster; place this card on the bottom of the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Danger! Response Team" once per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
